metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Professional writing assistance and revision. v4.3 adds context-aware whitelists + dynamic density thresholds + 11 real-world anchors. 基于《怎样写作》方法论的中文写作辅助与审稿润色，v4.3 新增上下文感知白名单（防火墙 IT 语境 / 对标 党政语境自动豁免）+ 千句密度动态阈值 + 11 篇真实锚本（含 cicpa 第三方咨询交付范本）。
